jobs.description: Building the settlement layer for agent-to-agent transactions. Contributing across protocol design, grant allocation tooling, agent procurement systems, and core AI infrastructure. Based in San Francisco.

Building an AI-powered financial assistant for underbanked markets. Shipped a React Native app with voice transaction recording, real-time financial insights, and automated receipt generation — integrating VAPI voice AI and Twilio. End-to-end: product vision, engineering, and go-to-market.

Designed and shipped community health applications deployed in 20+ countries. Led end-to-end service design — user research, workflow architecture, cross-functional collaboration with NGO partners and government health systems. Focused on high-impact UX in low-resource environments.

Drove growth strategy and network expansion for one of Africa's fastest-scaling fintech companies. Ran product experiments, conducted user interviews, and fed findings directly into the app development cycle — contributing to Wave's rapid user acquisition.
Early operator at Wave during its high-growth phase. Supported the operational backbone of a mobile remittance platform that helped bring millions of people into digital financial services.
O&T role within Citi's international operations. Exposure to enterprise-scale financial infrastructure and institutional processes.
Conducted credit analysis and financial risk assessment for institutional clients. Foundation in structured financial evaluation and analytical rigor.
